RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CHARLES GAMBLE, ALBERT SUBLOIE and TANGOE, INC.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons: CONTINUED to 10/29/04 in Dept. 301.
